subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of the Lord God! Thy written letter hath been perused, and its contents have been noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حضرت یزدان مکتوب مسطور ملحوظ گشت ورق منشور مشهور آمد مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @praise and encouragement
